name: Federated App Platform — approval frames
description: Contract-freeze UX artifacts for the federated-app platform. Approving these frames approves the App Manifest model before UI implementation. frontend-test-engineer drives Playwright against these via the data-frame / data-* attributes.

frames.label: (a) Application menu
frames.summary: App menu + launcher with built-in Clock and newly-registered Market.

frames.label: (b) Register -> Activate
frames.summary: Add-application form (manifest fields) -> registered -> activate -> visible.

frames.label: (c) Menu substitution
frames.summary: Studio app substitutes the portal side menu; host keeps return-to-portal.

frames.label: (d) Standalone app
frames.summary: Standalone non-portal landing page: FuzeFront infra, no portal chrome.
